executive_summary.main_recommendation: AI spend appears productive overall, but value is uneven across employees. Keep budget levels steady because total spend is within budget at 81.7%, forecast spend is down 5.6% next month, story point gain is up 17.5%, and bugs are down 59.6%. The main management action is to reduce and control usage for the clear overspenders and quality-risk users, while formally using the high-roi and efficient users as coaches so their token habits spread. For low-adoption users, prioritize adoption coaching before budget cuts because their low usage and low story point output suggest missed value more than excess cost.

employee_metrics.name: Leila Park
employee_metrics.recommendation: Leila Park sets the standard. She is rank #1 of 40 for story points and rank #2 of 40 for efficiency, using 206858 tokens per story point, which means how many tokens were spent to deliver one story point; lower is better, and this is far below the team median of 4285456. Replicate her workflow and have her mentor peers on prompt discipline and context control. Next month, watch tokens per story point and keep it below the team median.

employee_metrics.recommendation: Amina Blanc is delivering strong results with low token use. She produced 65 story points with 40417346 tokens, and her 1.61 story points per million tokens is well above the team median of 0.24; higher is better because it means more delivery from the same token spend. Praise this behavior, replicate her workflow, and ask her to coach peers on how she selects tasks and uses prompts. Next month, watch story points per million tokens.
